name: Quick Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz.) Italian peeled tomatoes, drained and chopped
1 package ready-to-eat polenta (1 lb), cut in 8 rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add onions; cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
3. Add garlic, peppers, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, wine, oregano, salt, pepper and bay leaf.
4. Bring to boiling; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Uncover; cook for another 10 minutes until the liquid is reduced by half.
6. Remove from heat; stir in parsley.
7. Heat broiler.
8. Coat a baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
9. Arrange polenta on the pan.
10. Broil 4 inches from the heat until polenta is lightly golden, about 3 minutes.
11. Transfer to platter.
12. Remove bay leaf from ratatouille; spoon over polenta.
